conditions.critical_condition_basis: Elution volume independent of molar mass
conditions.evidence_text: The critical composition found by us coincides nicely with results of Berek in a similar system... all standards have practically the same elution volume in this eluent composition... 37% THF in toluene
conditions.notes: Critical composition determined by isocratic runs after gradient estimation. Table 2 lists 37.20% as the actual critical composition.
conditions.physical_address: Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), Schlossgartenstr. 6, D-64289 Darmstadt, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Elution volume independent of molar mass
conditions.evidence_text: The critical composition, as determined by the crossing of the lines corresponding to different molar mass, is 83% MeOH. This value is in good agreement with the estimation from the eluting composition of the gradient runs (82.6%).
conditions.notes: Critical composition determined by isocratic runs after gradient estimation. Table 2 lists 83.00% as the actual critical composition.
conditions.physical_address: Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), Schlossgartenstr. 6, D-64289 Darmstadt, Germany
